childNodes.textContent:
Kitsoki mesa-sun favicon, inlined as a data URI: the SPA is built as a
         single go:embed'd file (vite-plugin-singlefile), so an external
         /favicon.svg reference would not be served. Source of truth:
         docs/branding/assets/mesa-sun-simple.svg (the small-size glyph).

Kitsoki "Mesa Sun" mark (docs/branding/logo.md, mesa-sun-simple.svg).
         Inlined as an SVG data URI so it survives vite-plugin-singlefile's
         single-file bundle and ships inside index.html — the Go web server
         (internal/runstatus/server) only routes "/" and "/rpc/*", so an
         external /favicon.svg would 404.

node.textContent: Land the component + dock seam behind the opt-in toggle (off by default), document the setting in the web UI reference, announce in the changelog. Purely additive — no migration.
— pure inline SVG + CSS keyframes, no images, no dependencies. The work is a self-contained component, a dock seam in the trace-column layout, and an opt-in toggle (off by default).
anchored at the bottom of the existing kitsoki web
, that   mounts the pet only when enabled.
/ the trace column component),   absolutely positioned over the column footer so it never displaces trace rows. -
(a gentle   bob and an occasional blink). No images, no deps, no props required. -
renders an inline-SVG sprite with a CSS keyframe

flowchart LR
  col[trace column layout] --> pet[TracePet anchored bottom]
  pet --> svg[inline SVG sprite]
ADR-1: Inline SVG + CSS keyframes only — zero dependencies
, so the feature ships zero assets and cannot slow the UI.
The sprite and its animation are authored as inline SVG markup with CSS keyframes in the component. No image files, no sprite sheets, no animation library, no added network requests.
ADR-2: Opt-in, absolutely positioned at the column bottom
at the bottom of the trace column. It overlays the column footer rather than participating in the trace list's flow, so it can never push, clip, or block trace rows.
The pet is off by default and, when enabled, is
, dampening or pausing the bob/blink when the user asks for less motion.
Continuous motion can be distracting or inaccessible. The idle animation is gated behind

Component renders the SVG sprite and applies the idle-animation class.
With the setting off (default), the pet is not mounted.
The pet is absolutely positioned and the trace list height is unchanged when it
mounts (no row displacement). - Reduced-motion preference dampens/pauses the animation.
